title: Audit a publish path for dual writes
description: Trace where a state change publishes an event and report whether it is atomic via an outbox or a risky dual write.
body: Use when asked whether event publishing is reliable. Actions: locate the command that mutates state and emits the event; verify the event is written to an outbox inside the same transaction and relayed separately, rather than published as a second independent step; check the relay is idempotent. Do not accept ordered try/catch as a substitute for atomicity. Report and record the exact location and classify it as outbox-backed, CDC-backed, or dual-write. This skill is read-only and must not publish to live topics. Validation signals include a crash-injection test showing no orphaned/lost event. Risk boundary: a dual write on a critical flow is a blocking finding to escalate.
